nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: Wied's tyrant-manakin
nodes.summary: Wied's tyrant-manakin（Wied's tyrant-manakin，学名 Neopelma aurifrons），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要威胁包括森林砍伐、气候变化、小种群风险。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Its lowland forest habitat has been historically threatened by agricultural conversion, deforestation for mining and plantation production

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Current key threats to these forests are urbanisation, agricultural expansion, selective logging, dam construction, colonisation and associated road building." Alterations in its habitat due to climate change is a further potential threat. It is considered rare to uncommon. "Conservation priorities include establishment of effective protection of the small population found NE of Rio de Janeiro city; field surveys also required in order to determine whether the species survives at other sites within its range."

links.label: 受威胁于
